$comment: c21 (D-CSUBSET-VOLATILE-QUALIFIER): a pointer-to-volatile-POINTEE STRUCT MEMBER (`struct S { volatile int *p; }`) fails loud S_VolatilePointeeNotSupported via the CO-LOCATED type-resolver arm (the member head consumes the star, so the reject is position-aware on the flat `volatile int *` type node). The sibling object/param/typedef forms are caught by the per-declarator arm (see volatile_error). The reject returns InvalidType, which cascades a secondary S_UnknownType on the field at col 1 — both asserted so the full diagnostic set is pinned.
